title: anthemis biebersteiniana
intro: Anthemis biebersteiniana, also known as Bieberstein's chamomile, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, relieving menstrual cramps, and reducing anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
